prompt: Go through our will/trust checkout flow and find any bugs that could cause a customer to pay but not get their documents, or be charged the wrong amount. Log anything real to BUGS.md.

assertions.text: Identifies a paid-but-not-fulfilled failure mode (webhook miss/idempotency or no reconciliation)
Cross-checks charged amount against lib/orders/pricing.ts SSOT
Findings cite file:line with severity ratings
Proposes BUGS.md entries continuing the BUG-N numbering, without editing real BUGS.md
